tests.intent: Required columns, numeric config rows, metadata key, and named domain index exist.
All 1,196 vertices and 1,175 linedefs are represented exactly once and no line is degenerate.
Database MIN/MAX values equal the independent E1M1 extrema.
Both metadata dimensions equal live extrema expanded by the sum of both live configuration values.
Production metadata SQL computes MIN/MAX and both config terms and does not embed pinned output bounds.
Each geometry is a null-SRID two-point 2D straight line with canonical element info.
All ordinates preserve the directed start and end vertex coordinates.
Every geometry validates at the approved tolerance and validation returns no null/error rows.
Length and normalized direction use the unrounded Euclidean norm and approved decimal rounding.
Six independent pinned horizontal, vertical, oblique, shortest, and longest probes match exactly.
The named GEOM index is a Spatial domain R-tree rather than a B-tree or function-based substitute.
Oracle reports valid base, domain, and operator status and indexed queries execute.
A known MBR-only candidate is observed and rejected by the following exact predicate.
True contacts survive exact testing before and after a large translation.
